content.en:
Bang!!!!

Ye Tian attacked the Jiuxuanwei River, causing a concussion in the Jiuxuanwei River.

"Look for death!"

The two Eighth Realms guarding the Jiuxuan Weihe were furious, and they all attacked Ye Tian, but Ye Tian didn't fight with them and fled directly.

The two Eighth Realms didn't think too much about it, and directly chased and killed them.

In their opinion, killing a Seventh Realm is not an easy matter.

And just after these two Eighth Realms left, Ye Tian's other copy body moved, he was now a member of the Ten Pyloric Sects, and he directly attacked the formation of destroying the treasure house, which was equivalent to internal destruction, and was not hindered in any way.

Thundered!!!!

The formation was broken by Ye Tian without any defense, and the Seventh Realm came to stop Ye Tian.

Rumble!

The Primal Sword Domain erupted, directly killing this group of Seventh Realm Extradimensional Realms in an instant.

Immediately after, Ye Tian took away all the resources of this treasure house, including those Nine Xuan Gold Liquid.

"Hurry up, those two Eighth Realms will definitely come over in time!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Swish!

He quickly escaped from the Jiuxuanwei River, and then left here, shuttling through the fifteenth dimension of 587, and vanished.

He also knew very well that the fifteenth dimension was dangerous, but there shouldn't be much danger in this vicinity, so after he escaped for some distance, he found a place to rest for a while.

He couldn't break the barrier of the fifteenth dimension and return to the upper domain from the fifteenth dimension, so he could only continue to stay in the fifteenth dimension.

At present, he just wants to find a suitable place to cultivate, and when his cultivation breaks through to the eighth realm in the future, and his soul will reaches the fifteenth dimension, he can return to the upper domain and the human race.

The other side.

The two Eighth Realms of the Ten Pyloric Gates did not dare to chase and kill too deeply, after all, they were only the cultivation of the Eighth Realm, if they pursued and killed too deeply, and encountered the extremely powerful Eighth Realm multi-dimensional life, they would also be in danger of falling.

In addition, they received the news that the Jiuxuanwei River had been attacked, and they immediately rushed back, but it was also a step too late.

After they inquired, they learned that it was a member of the Seventh Realm who did it, but in their opinion, the identity of that Seventh Realm must be fake.

They deduced it, but they couldn't deduce Ye Tian's trace.

Therefore, they immediately reported the situation to the Ninth Realm, even if they would be punished by the Ninth Realm, they had to report it, otherwise they would be in trouble if they concealed it and did not report it.

Soon.

The Ninth Realm knew about the situation of the Nine Xuanwei River, and they were immediately furious.

Countless years, there has never been a force that dares to offend the Ten Pyloric Sects, and now this mysterious Seventh Realm dares to directly snatch the Nine Xuanwei River's Nine Xuanwei Golden Liquid, and has killed so many Seventh Realms, some of which are the descendants of the Eighth Realm!

Poison Dragon Realm Master!

Storm Realm Lord!

Lord of the Jackdaw Realm!

The three Ninth Realms of the Ten Pyloric Sects immediately began to deduce, but they couldn't deduce a trace of Ye Tian.

"There is no trace of deduction, unless that seventh realm has cultivated a secret technique that can shield the deduction of the ninth realm, or he has the ninth realm behind him, and the secret technique is cast for him to block his traces. "

The three Ninth Realms naturally thought that it was the last possibility, that is, the mastermind of this matter was a certain Ninth Realm.

They thought about the Ninth Realm with whom they had an enmity in their minds, but they still couldn't confirm which one did it.

"Check, find out the identity of the seventh realm first!"

The three Ninth Realm ordered.

However, they were destined to not be able to find it, after all, Ye Tian used the Misty Eye Soul Technique to cover himself, and he didn't even reveal his breath and appearance, how could they check?

......

"This harvest is too big, not only has I obtained a large amount of Nine Xuan Gold Liquid, but I have also obtained other resource treasures. "

Ye Tian was in a good mood.

Immediately, he asked the other replica bodies to explore the void in the fifteenth dimension, and soon found a safer place to look (bbaa) up, which was actually a fragment of a star, and there should be no danger in hiding inside.

Wow!

Ye Tian passed, opened a cave in this fragment, and then began to retreat and cultivate, using the Nine Xuan Golden Liquid to improve his cultivation.

Gurgling !!!

The Nine Xuan Gold Liquid was swallowed by Ye Tian and refined to improve his own cultivation.

In a flash, thirty domain yuan years have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation finally broke through, from the late stage of the seventh realm to the peak realm of the seventh realm, and his strength also improved a little.

"Breakthrough, the peak of the seventh realm, plus the Taihao gold liquid given to me by the master of the Purple Yun Realm, I can hit the eighth realm!"

But he didn't attack, his goal was still to attack the eighth realm with the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions.

Now, he has continued to comprehend the primordial star, and he has already comprehended the rules of one hundred and ninety-two dimensions, and it will not be long before he can comprehend the rules of two hundred and sixty-five dimensions, and it is not hopeless to be away from the rules of three hundred and sixty-five dimensions.

"However, the multi-dimensional wisdom light and the Yinxuan Illustrated Book are too low-grade, if you upgrade it, you can understand the dimensional rules faster. "

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, the multi-dimensional wisdom light is only an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, not a dimensional domain body, if it is a multi-dimensional wisdom light at the level of a dimensional domain body, then it can greatly improve the efficiency of his comprehension of dimensional rules.

"The grade of the Silver Xuan Atlas is very low, but you can find a higher-level replacement, you can find a top-level dimensional treasure, or even a dimensional star weapon!"

The Dimensional Star Weapon is made from the fragments of some stars in the sixteenth, seventeenth, and eighteenth dimensions, and contains terrifying powers.

Many Eighth Realms have a dimensional star weapon, and if you find a dimensional star weapon similar to the effect of the Silver Xuan Illustrated Book, you can definitely increase his comprehension effect.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to inquire about this information, and soon found a similar top-level dimensional treasure, but there was no news of the dimensional star weapon.

The top-level dimensional treasure that Ye Tian found, called the Xuanlin Mirror, has the effect of deduction and analysis, but there are also side effects.

Its value is very high, but Ye Tian's net worth now is also very expensive, so he naturally easily won this top-level dimensional treasure.

Then, Ye Tian began to think about creating a dimensional domain body, he didn't expect to create that kind of dimensional domain body that was complete and had no sequelae, it was too difficult.

But if you create a dimensional domain body that is relatively spicy and has great side effects, it should be possible.

Subsequently, in the following days, Ye Tian used the Jiaye wisdom body as the basis to improve and transform it, and raised it to the level of the dimensional domain body.
